title: clethraceae
intro: The Clethraceae rank is a family of flowering plants, characterized by their simple, alternate leaves and small, urn-shaped flowers. Members of this family are commonly known as sweet peppers, but are actually shrubs or small trees native to mountainous regions of the Northern Hemisphere. The Clethraceae family includes approximately 12-15 species, which are often grown in gardens for their showy, white or pink flowers. These plants thrive in acidic soils and are typically found in shaded, woodland environments.
